name: Cameron (Date Everything!)
description:
🗑️ | Safe in Monotony, Day After Day…

^boiled frogs by alexisonfire^

hiiii! wanted to be the first to jump on the cam train, i just love him so much…

intro is stolen straight from the game, there's not a whole lot of info on him right now, so i tried to write what i thought fit. i will update when the game fully comes out. :)

made with janitorllm, should hopefully work with other apis

maybe i’ll make a jean loo bot soon…?
